description: Contributing to open-source projects through GirlScript Summer of Code (GSSoC '25), focusing on DevOps workflows and collaborative development across remote teams.
Leading the content team at GDG JIS University, overseeing content strategy, event documentation, and community engagement for Google Developer Group initiatives on-site in Kolkata.
Active member of GDG Kolkata, participating in developer meetups, tech talks, and community-driven events around Google technologies and open-source development.
Contributed to Open Source Connect as a part-time contributor, working on DevOps tooling and version control workflows across open-source projects in India.
Designing user interfaces and building machine learning pipelines using TensorFlow and PyTorch. Combines design thinking with deep learning to create intuitive, AI-powered experiences.
Authoring research papers in computer science, exploring intersections of machine learning, open-source software, and emerging technologies as a pre-final year CSE undergraduate.
Co-developing the Elixpo portfolio platform — a unified, content-driven showcase for organization members built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion.
